Experience

From open to work to growth roles

A personal timeline from a transition season to stronger role clarity and business impact.

Home / Journal / Experience / From Open to Work to Growth Roles
Experience Published February 27, 2026 By Thomas Hayford

A few years ago, I publicly shared that I was open to work. That season taught me humility, patience, and the value of consistent effort.

From there, I kept building practical experience across operations, support, and relationship work. In 2023, I moved into Hubtel's growth environment and started delivering in merchant-focused roles.

By March 2025, I stepped into the Relationship Manager role. Alongside my job path, I kept growing my learning base and continued developing Iderwell as a founder.

The main lesson from this timeline is simple. Stay visible, stay useful, and keep improving your execution quality. Over time, opportunities become clearer.

Timeline Markers

  • Transition SeasonPublic open-to-work phase with active networking.
  • Execution SeasonCross-functional roles and measurable relationship work.
  • Growth SeasonRelationship Manager progression and founder development.
Read full biography

Written by Thomas Hayford.
